stories.headline: PJM Market Monitor Asks FERC to Reject Hull Street's $1.3 GW Buy of Lee County, Tait Gas Peakers — Same Data-Center-Carve-Out Pattern as Talen-Amazon
stories.summary: Monitoring Analytics urged FERC to block Hull Street Energy's purchase of two gas peakers totaling 1,267 MW from Rockland Capital (677-MW Lee County in Illinois and 590-MW Tait near Dayton), warning the deal could pull capacity out of PJM's market to serve data centers and shift costs to other customers — the same fight Allegheny is watching at Susquehanna.

stories.headline: Talen-Amazon Susquehanna ISA Restructure: BTM-to-Front-of-Meter Transition Tied to Spring 2026 Refueling Outage
stories.summary: Talen and Amazon's expanded 1,920-MW PPA from Susquehanna (through 2042) is set to transition from the existing 300-MW behind-the-meter setup to a grid-connected, front-of-the-meter arrangement during this spring's scheduled refueling outage — the workaround for FERC's November 2024 ISA rejection that AEP and Exelon helped force.

stories.headline: Two More Offshore Wind Projects Scrapped; NYISO Warns Extended Heat Wave Could Cripple New York Grid This Summer
stories.summary: Utility Dive reports two more East Coast offshore wind projects pulled this week as developers cite cost and permitting headwinds, while NYISO told regulators an extended summer heat wave could push the New York grid past reliability margins — same load-growth-vs-supply squeeze PJM is facing.

stories.headline: Consumers Energy Q1 Sales Boosted by Industrial/Data-Center Loads as Coal Plant Emergency-Order Costs Rise
stories.summary: Michigan's Consumers Energy reported industrial-load growth (largely data centers) drove Q1 sales up while costs from federal emergency orders keeping coal units running climbed — a preview of the cost-allocation fight Pennsylvania co-ops will face if PJM emergency-orders MISO/PJM coal units this summer.

stories.headline: House GOP Week Unraveling Before Tuesday Lunch: FISA 702 Stuck in Rules, DHS Funding Cliff Thursday (Day 73), Budget Resolution Whip Count Soft
stories.summary: Speaker Mike Johnson is fighting on four fronts — Rules recessed Monday night without a path on FISA Section 702 (lapses Thursday), the Senate-passed DHS bill is being rewritten to restore ICE/Border Patrol funding before April 30 pay cliff, the budget resolution lacks votes, and the farm bill is hung up on pesticide labeling and E15.

stories.headline: King Charles III Addresses Joint Meeting of Congress at 3 PM — First Royal Address Since Queen Elizabeth in 1991
stories.summary: King Charles will deliver the first royal address to Congress in 35 years today at 3 p.m., with aides previewing pointed references to NATO, AUKUS, Ukraine and the Royal Navy — a direct push back against Trump-Hegseth dismissals of UK security commitments; bilateral with Trump at 11:40 a.m., state dinner at 8:05 p.m.

stories.headline: Trump Rejects Iran Strait of Hormuz Proposal; Energy Markets Bracing for Another Price Spike
stories.summary: Trump told top advisers he is not satisfied with Iran's latest Strait of Hormuz reopening offer (no path on nuclear program); WTI closed near $96/bbl Monday on the supply-risk premium, with energy advisers warning Truth Social posts can only quell concern so long.

stories.headline: DeSantis Releases Florida Map Targeting 24R-4D Split; Special Session on Redistricting Begins Today
stories.summary: Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis released a proposed congressional map Monday cutting the Democratic delegation from 8 to 4 — Castor, Soto, Frost, Wasserman Schultz, Frankel, Wilson and Moskowitz are the most squeezed; Florida special session opens today with a possible House/Senate floor vote tomorrow, Democrats vow court fight.

stories.headline: Five Living Former PA Governors (Wolf, Corbett, Rendell, Schweiker, Ridge) Call on State Leaders to Make Shapiro's Security a Priority After WHCD Shooting
stories.summary: All five of Pennsylvania's living former governors issued a joint statement urging state leaders to prioritize Gov. Josh Shapiro's protection following the third assassination attempt on President Trump at Saturday's White House Correspondents' Dinner, calling political-violence prevention 'nonpartisan and a priority.'

stories.headline: Fitzpatrick Sits With Punchbowl: Moderate GOP Survival, Shutdowns, Working With Shapiro and Fetterman
stories.summary: Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick (R-PA-01) gave Punchbowl a wide-ranging interview last week on being a moderate in today's GOP, the 73-day DHS shutdown dynamic, and his cross-party relationships with Gov. Josh Shapiro and Sen. John Fetterman — relevant for any PREA outreach to PA-01 or to the Shapiro orbit.

stories.headline: PA House Committee Advances Bipartisan Bills to Abolish Death Penalty
stories.summary: A Pennsylvania House committee on Monday passed a pair of bills to end capital punishment in the commonwealth with support from members of both parties — would resolve decades of de facto moratorium under successive governors with no executions carried out.

stories.headline: 16th State Senate Dem Primary Debate Tonight: Pinsley vs. Merkl-Gump in Lehigh Valley Open Seat
stories.summary: Lehigh Valley Public Media hosts the only Democratic primary debate tonight between Lehigh County Controller Mark Pinsley and Erica Merkl-Gump in the 16th State Senate District (open Lisa Boscola seat); winner faces a competitive general — a seat to watch on the Senate Consumer Protection / Energy committee makeup.

stories.headline: Penguins Stave Off Elimination 3-2 — Letang Game-Winner (Second Straight), Crosby Two Assists; Down 3-2, Game 6 Wednesday in Philly
stories.summary: Kris Letang scored the game-winner for the second straight game and Sidney Crosby added two assists as Pittsburgh beat the Flyers 3-2 in Game 5 to force a Game 6 — Soderblom and Dewar also scored, Bump and Sanheim for Philadelphia; series now 3-2 Flyers, Game 6 Wednesday 7:30 p.m. at Xfinity Mobile Arena.

stories.headline: Pirates' Near-No-Hitter Broken Up in 7th, Then Cardinals Rally in 9th to Steal a 4-2 Win at PNC
stories.summary: Pittsburgh carried a perfect game into the 7th before Alec Burleson's infield single broke it up, then the Cardinals rallied for four runs in the 9th — Pedro Pagés HR, Jose Fermin bases-clearing double down the left-field line — to flip a 2-1 deficit into a 4-2 win and drop the Bucs to 16-14; series finale tonight vs. St. Louis.

stories.headline: Steelers Wrap 10-Pick 2026 Draft Class: Iheanachor (Round 1 OL), Bernard (Round 2 WR), Allar (Round 3 QB) Headline McCarthy's First Class
stories.summary: Pittsburgh's draft class is set: Arizona State OL Max Iheanachor in Round 1 (No. 21), Alabama WR Germie Bernard in Round 2 (after a trade up with Indianapolis), Penn State QB Drew Allar plus Georgia CB Daylen Everette and Iowa G Gennings Dunker in Round 3, Iowa WR Kaden Wetjen, Indiana FB Riley Nowakowski, Notre Dame DE Gabriel Rubio, Oklahoma S Robert Spears-Jennings, and Navy RB/WR Eli Heidenreich rounding out the class.
